# Danish Ansari

> Mechatronics engineer integrating hardware and software to create applications in machine learning, robotics, and finance. Currently working at Velarko.

## About

- [Portfolio](https://danishansari.co): Personal website and portfolio of Danish Ansari (dan10ish).

## Expertise

- Artificial Intelligence & Machine Learning
- Robotics & Mechatronics Engineering
- Finance & Quantitative Analysis
- Full-Stack Software Development

## Projects

- [Arm Visualizer](https://dan10ish.github.io/RoboticArm/): 3D robotic arm movement visualizer and simulator. [Source](https://github.com/dan10ish/RoboticArm)
- [3DOF Robotic Arm](https://github.com/dan10ish/3DOF-RoboticArm-C): 3 Degrees of Freedom robotic arm control system in C.
- [Pathfinder](https://dan10ish.github.io/pathfinding-visualizer/): Interactive pathfinding algorithm visualizer. [Source](https://github.com/dan10ish/pathfinding-visualizer)
- [Office](https://dan10ish.github.io/Office/): Web-based office suite. [Source](https://github.com/dan10ish/Office)
- [Galaxy](https://dan10ish.github.io/Galaxy/): Interactive galaxy simulation with particle systems. [Source](https://github.com/dan10ish/Galaxy)
- [macOS](https://os-danishs-projects-31d8c677.vercel.app/): macOS-inspired portfolio with desktop simulation. [Source](https://github.com/dan10ish/os)
- [Code Editor](http://dan10ish.github.io/code): Web-based code editor with syntax highlighting. [Source](https://github.com/dan10ish/code)
- [College Notes](https://dan10ish.github.io/college/): Digital college notes and study materials. [Source](https://github.com/dan10ish/college)
- [AlgoSim](https://github.com/dan10ish/AlgoSim): Algorithm visualization and simulation tool.
- [CogniCart](https://github.com/dan10ish/cogni-cart): AI-powered shopping cart with cognitive recommendations.
- [Comment Toxicity](https://github.com/dan10ish/CommentToxicity): ML model to detect toxic comments using NLP.
- [Terminal](https://github.com/dan10ish/Unity-Terminal_Hacker): Terminal-based hacking simulation game in Unity.
- [Cube](https://github.com/dan10ish/Unity-ProjectRun): 3D endless runner game in Unity.
